teacher.name: Celestin Mande
teacher.intro: I have experience teaching students, especially in subjects like Algebra and Geometry, and I understand how important it is to learn step by step. I also have experience supporting learners and working with data, which has helped me become patient, organized, and attentive when guiding others. I am passionate about helping students succeed and am always willing to go the extra mile to ensure you understand the material.
teacher.languages: I speak English and French. I understand the the challenges and the excitement of learning a new language or improving you existing language.
teacher.purpose: Learning English is a fascinating journey. In this class, we will focus on:
goals: Understanding grammar in a simple way
teacher.highlight: You do not need to be perfect. What matters most is that you try, participate, and improve a little every day.
